system for consistency, completeness, and accessibility.\",\n           tags: \"[\\\"design-systems\\\",\\\"audit-system\\\",\\\"command\\\",\\\"workflow\\\"]\",\n           intents: \"[\\\"run audit-system\\\",\\\"execute audit-system\\\",\\\"run a comprehensive audit of an existing design system for consistency, completeness, and accessibility.\\\"]\",\n           dependencies: \"[]\",\n using naming-convention skill\\\",\\\"Completeness: Check for missing states/docs using documentation-template skill\\\",\\\"Accessibility: Review against WCAG 2.2 AA using accessibility-audit skill\\\",\\\"Token coverage: Verify token usage using design-token skill\\\",\\\"Theming: Check theme support using theming-system skill\\\",\\\"Report: Prioritized findings with severity ratings\\\"]\",\n           rules: \"[]\",\n           examples: \"[]\",\n           references: \"[\\\"design-systems-create-component\\\",\\\"design-systems-tokenize\\\"]\",\n           rawContent: accessibility.\\\",\\\"argumentHint\\\":\\\"[design system name or description of what to audit]\\\",\\\"steps\\\":[{\\\"step\\\":\\\"Inventory\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"List all components, tokens, patterns using component-spec and design-token skills\\\"},{\\\"step\\\":\\\"Consistency\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Evaluate naming using naming-convention skill\\\"},{\\\"step\\\":\\\"Completeness\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Check for missing states/docs using documentation-template skill\\\"},{\\\"step\\\":\\\"Accessibility\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Review against WCAG 2.2 AA using accessibility-audit skill\\\"},{\\\"step\\\":\\\"Token coverage\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Verify token usage using design-token skill\\\"},{\\\"step\\\":\\\"Theming\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Check theme support using theming-system skill\\\"},{\\\"step\\\":\\\"Report\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Prioritized findings with severity ratings\\\"}],\\\"output\\\":\\\"Audit report with executive summary, issue counts by severity, components\\\",\\\"Best practice: Document each token with usage context\\\",\\\"Best practice: Version tokens alongside your design system\\\",\\\"Best practice: Support theming by keeping alias tokens abstract\\\",\\\"Naming: {category}-{property}-{variant}-{state}\\\"]\",\n           examples: \"[{\\\"name\\\":\\\"Global tokens\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Raw values (e.g., blue-500: (color, spacing, typography, elevation) with naming conventions and usage guidance.\\\",\\\"role\\\":\\\"You are an expert in design token architecture and systematic design foundations.\\\",\\\"whatYouDo\\\":\\\"You help define, organize, and document design tokens \u2014 the atomic values that drive visual consistency. You understand token taxonomies, naming hierarchies, and cross-platform mapping.\\\",\\\"tokenCategories\\\":{\\\"color\\\":\\\"Global palette, alias tokens (surface, text, border), component tokens\\\",\\\"spacing\\\":\\\"Base unit (4px/8px), scale (xs through 3xl), contextual (inset, stack, inline)\\\",\\\"typography\\\":\\\"Font families, size scale, weights, line tokens\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Semantic references (e.g., color-action-primary)\\\"},{\\\"tier\\\":\\\"Component tokens\\\",\\\"description\\\":\\\"Scoped usage (e.g., button-color-primary)\\\"}],\\\"namingConvention\\\":\\\"{category}-{property}-{variant}-{state}\\\",\\\"bestPractices\\\":[\\\"Start with global tokens, then create semantic aliases\\\",\\\"Never
